query:
UPDATE courses SET cpdHours = 
  CASE 
    WHEN code = 'DIV101' THEN 8
    WHEN code = 'DIV102' THEN 6
    WHEN code = 'DIV103' THEN 10
    WHEN code = 'DIV104' THEN 9
    WHEN code = 'DIV105' THEN 9
    WHEN code = 'DIV106' THEN 9
    WHEN code = 'DIV107' THEN 6
    WHEN code = 'DIV108' THEN 6
    WHEN code = 'DIV109' THEN 5
    WHEN code = 'DIV110' THEN 7
    ELSE 0
  END
WHERE code IN ('DIV101', 'DIV102', 'DIV103', 'DIV104', 'DIV105', 'DIV106', 'DIV107', 'DIV108', 'DIV109', 'DIV110');
